task_description: Remove the task-to-card linking feature completely while keeping the task system (create, edit, delete, complete, persist) fully functional. Remove: link task to card, unlink task from card, store card reference inside task, jump to card from task, any UI related to task-card connection, any task-card connection logic during import/export.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds. No test framework exists in this project. grep confirms all task-card linking references (cardTaskLinks, addTaskFromCard, getLinkedCard, onLocateCard, locateCard) are fully removed from source.
